title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
